home.hero_description: Carefully curated properties for a discerning clientele, in the most sought-after destinations.
home.about_title: A demanding network wherever real estate equals desirability.
home.about_p1: Our house places its curated selection of properties in the most sought-after destinations, showcasing premium real estate with an approach close to the editorial codes of the great international houses.
home.about_p2: From primary residences to holiday properties, we prioritise excellence of service, discretion and a refined search experience.
home.featured_title: Discover an exceptional selection of properties
home.featured_description: An editorial spotlight on the most desirable properties of the moment.
home.expertises_description: Buying, selling, renting and accompanying premium properties in strategic locations.
home.sell_title: Value and sell your property with a demanding presentation.
home.sell_description: From valuation to showcasing the property and through to signing, we orchestrate a results-oriented premium sales strategy.
home.news_description: Markets, art of living, selections and perspectives on exceptional real estate.
home.newsletter_title: Receive the best of real estate news and our selections.
home.newsletter_description: Leave us a message to start your buying, selling or rental project.
home.form_success: Your message has been sent successfully.

properties.page_desc_all: Select a city, budget, property type and number of rooms to refine your search.
properties.page_desc_sale: Discover our selection of properties available for purchase.
properties.page_desc_rent: Apartments, houses and villas available for rent.
properties.empty_desc: Adjust your filters to broaden the search.

property_detail.presentation_title: A property designed for a discerning clientele.
property_detail.presentation_p2: Our team showcases the most sought-after addresses with a clear reading of volumes, location and features in order to streamline decision-making.
property_detail.agency_text: An editorial presentation, a network of qualified buyers and discreet guidance at every stage.
property_detail.visit_message: Hello, I would like to arrange a visit for the property: "{title}" ({city}). Please contact me to schedule an appointment.

footer.description: Tentation Immobiliere guides a discerning clientele through an exceptional selection of properties, an editorial perspective and a discreet service.
